problem_statement: AI-assisted development tools are adopted informally and without oversight, leaving software quality, security, and productivity impacts from AI-generated code unmeasurable and ungoverned; traditional process/maturity models cannot handle the probabilistic nature of AI-generated code.
magnitude_evidence: AI tools 'can boost developer productivity by lowering routine coding tasks by about 30-50%' [1],[2]
insufficiency_evidence: Traditional models 'fail to guide probabilistic and non-deterministic software processes for code generated by LLMs'; generated code 'may contain security vulnerabilities, licensing issues, or subtle logical errors that escape standard reviews' [5]
key_constructs: AI-Assisted Software Development Organizational Maturity Model
